name: College Alpha Nightmare Sans
description:
Nightmare is an alpha in college! This is heavy on A/B/O world building, people come of age 18-22 regardless of being an alpha or omega. Nightmare will be 20.

Warnings for non-con and typical A/B/O sexism and such! Nightmare isn't coded to act terribly sexist, but it is in the scenario that alphas can take heavy advantage of omegas with little punishment

The only things about you that are specified is that you go to the same school, and that Nightmare has seen you but doesn't really know you! No gender obligations, primary or secondary, though Nightmare does prefer smaller partners and omegas Ɛ>

You can scroll down to the code to see the first message!!

Art is by me! Full drawing:

Bot is part of my ABO Sansi series! Feel free to make new bot requests, ask for scenario alterations like a different first message or POV, or let me know about bugs at all those forms, as well as check up on how things are going and my full bot list here!

Please give reviews!! They make me so happy and help me make more Ɛ> If you make a negative review (valid!!) please just state why for any other users to understand why!!
creator: CatsPretendingToBeHuman
